vacuum_cost_delay: Manual VACUUM cost delay affects only post-workload unmeasured maintenance.
max_stack_depth: Depends on OS stack limits and can crash backend when misaligned.
allow_alter_system: Tuner applies settings via ALTER SYSTEM; disabling this breaks configuration application.
bonjour: Service discovery/network behavior, not performance tuning.
transaction_deferrable: Transaction/session semantic toggle, not a stable global performance knob.
transaction_read_only: Transaction/session semantic toggle, not a stable global performance knob.
transaction_isolation: Transaction/session semantic toggle, not a stable global performance knob.
port: Instance network binding parameter; not workload performance tuning.
ssl: Security transport policy parameter, excluded from autotuning scope.
ssl_passphrase_command_supports_reload: Security transport policy parameter, excluded from autotuning scope.
ssl_prefer_server_ciphers: Security transport policy parameter, excluded from autotuning scope.
pre_auth_delay: Artificially delays connection auth and distorts benchmark latency.
post_auth_delay: Artificially delays post-auth processing and distorts benchmark latency.
log_statement_stats: Mutually exclusive with parser/planner/executor stats and can cause config errors.
log_parser_stats: Mutually exclusive with statement/planner/executor stats and can cause config errors.
log_planner_stats: Mutually exclusive with statement/parser/executor stats and can cause config errors.
log_executor_stats: Mutually exclusive with statement/parser/planner stats and can cause config errors.
log_file_mode: Octal-mode parameter with unreliable readback/validation in this pipeline.
unix_socket_permissions: Octal-mode parameter with unreliable readback/validation in this pipeline.
logging_collector: Redirects logs and interferes with restart/log-driven orchestration behavior.
jit: Known instability for benchmark workloads in this environment.
jit_above_cost: Known instability for benchmark workloads in this environment.
jit_inline_above_cost: Known instability for benchmark workloads in this environment.
jit_optimize_above_cost: Known instability for benchmark workloads in this environment.
jit_debugging_support: Known instability for benchmark workloads in this environment.
jit_dump_bitcode: Known instability for benchmark workloads in this environment.
jit_expressions: Known instability for benchmark workloads in this environment.
jit_profiling_support: Known instability for benchmark workloads in this environment.
jit_tuple_deforming: Known instability for benchmark workloads in this environment.
statement_timeout: Can cancel post-workload maintenance and produce false failure signals.
zero_damaged_pages: Dangerous data-integrity bypass option; excluded from autotuning.
ignore_checksum_failure: Dangerous data-integrity bypass option; excluded from autotuning.
ignore_invalid_pages: Dangerous data-integrity bypass option; excluded from autotuning.
ignore_system_indexes: Dangerous data-integrity bypass option; excluded from autotuning.
post_column_optimize: Developer/internal behavior toggle not suitable for autotuning.
default_transaction_read_only: Changes SQL behavioral semantics rather than performance characteristics.
default_transaction_deferrable: Changes SQL behavioral semantics rather than performance characteristics.
exit_on_error: Alters error/crash behavior and destabilizes tuning loop execution.
restart_after_crash: Alters crash recovery behavior and destabilizes tuning loop execution.
debug_discard_caches: Debug/developer option; not valid for production workload tuning.
debug_io_direct: Debug/developer option; can produce high-volume internal debug output and distort benchmarks.
debug_parallel_query: Debug/developer option; not valid for production workload tuning.
debug_logical_replication_streaming: Debug/developer option; not valid for production workload tuning.
debug_print_parse: Debug/developer option; not valid for production workload tuning.
debug_print_plan: Debug/developer option; not valid for production workload tuning.
debug_print_rewritten: Debug/developer option; not valid for production workload tuning.
debug_pretty_print: Debug/developer option; not valid for production workload tuning.
trace_connection_negotiation: Debug/developer trace option; can generate noisy logs and perturb timing.
trace_notify: Debug/developer trace option; can generate noisy logs and perturb timing.
trace_sort: Debug/developer trace option; can generate noisy logs and perturb timing.
track_counts: Disabling stats collection causes errors and prevents collection of important metrics
log_min_messages: Low log-level settings (debug*) can flood logs and materially skew benchmark timing.
client_min_messages: Low message-level settings can alter runtime overhead and benchmark comparability.
allow_system_table_mods: System catalog mutation option; excluded from autotuning safety policy.
allow_in_place_tablespaces: Storage/path behavior option; excluded from autotuning safety policy.
log_rotation_age: Log file rotation schedule; does not affect workload performance.
log_parameter_max_length: Log truncation limit; does not affect workload performance.
log_parameter_max_length_on_error: Error log truncation; does not affect workload performance.
log_statement_sample_rate: Fraction of statements logged; can skew benchmark measurements.
log_transaction_sample_rate: Fraction of transactions logged; can skew benchmark measurements.
log_autovacuum_min_duration: Autovacuum logging threshold; does not affect actual maintenance pacing.
track_activity_query_size: pg_stat_activity query truncation; memory overhead is trivial and unmeasured.
authentication_timeout: Login timeout setting; not a workload performance tuning knob.
wal_receiver_status_interval: Replication heartbeat interval; not relevant for standalone benchmarks.
wal_summary_keep_time: WAL summary retention; does not affect workload performance.
max_active_replication_origins: Replication origin slots; not relevant as benchmarks don't use replication fanout.
max_replication_slots: Replication slot cap; not relevant as benchmarks don't use replication fanout.
max_sync_workers_per_subscription: Sync parallelism for replication; not relevant for standalone benchmarks.
max_prepared_transactions: 2PC transaction slots; not used by standard OLTP/OLAP benchmarks.
archive_timeout: WAL archiving timer; not relevant as benchmarks don't measure archiving latency.
extra_float_digits: Client display precision; semantic client behavior, not server performance.
xmlbinary: XML encoding toggle; semantic client behavior, not server performance.
xmloption: XML default handling; semantic client behavior, not server performance.
wal_decode_buffer_size: Recovery decode buffer; benchmarks measure normal execution, not crash recovery.
io_method: OS I/O subsystem selector (io_uring/posix/worker); infrastructure knob, not performance tuning. io_uring can exhaust kernel memory under multi-instance load.
